impact: This prevents the supervisor from repeatedly targeting obsolete blocked public-source-inventory tasks after checkbox-72 has already passed validation. It gives the daemon a deterministic recovery path: reconcile stale blocked task-board state first, then resume fixture-first or validation-first work instead of broad validator retries.
summary: Tighten supervisor recovery rules for stale blocked PP&D tasks after a narrower accepted repair.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 4 task(s) are blocked: Task checkbox-67: Add the public source inventory validator only after the syntax-first import test and one-unsafe-field fixture pass, covering allowlisted hosts, private DevHub paths, raw response bodies, downloaded documents, credentials, traces, screenshots, and required provenance fields.; Task checkbox-68: Restore the public source inventory syntax sentinel only: replace `ppd/contracts/public_source_inventory.py` as needed to preserve `MODULE_PURPOSE` and existing import-guard expectations before any validator behavior changes.; Task checkbox-70: Retry the public source inventory validator as a one-file implementation only after the `MODULE_PURPOSE` sentinel and expected unsafe-field fixture path pass validation.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
